intended_use: CT Cardiomegaly is a command line software application intended to be run on its own or as part of another medical device to automatically calculate linear and area based cardiothoracic ratio (CTR) fr
intended_use_full: CT Cardiomegaly is a command line software application intended to be run on its own or as part of another medical device to automatically calculate linear and area based cardiothoracic ratio (CTR) from a CT image containing the heart. CT Cardiomegaly is designed to measure the maximal transverse diameter of heart and maximal inner transverse diameter of thoracic cavity and calculate the CTR from an axial CT slice containing the heart using a non-adaptive machine learning algorithm.
ground_truth: Reference standard established by three board-certified radiologists who each independently provided segmentations for the heart and inner chest using manual segmentation tools
other_metrics: Mean Absolute Difference for Cardiothoracic Ratio: 0.009 [95% CI 0.007, 0.011]; Mean Difference for Cardiothoracic Ratio: 0.0012 [95% CI -0.0008, 0.0033]; Mean Absolute Difference for Heart to Chest Area Ratio: 0.009 [95% CI 0.007, 0.010]; Mean Difference for Heart to Chest Area Ratio: 0.0036 [95% CI 0.0017, 0.0055]; 95% Limits of Agreement: [-0.033, 0.035] for Cardiothoracic Ratio and [-0.028, 0.035] for Heart to Chest Area Ratio; Key Heart Slice Detection Mean Difference: 0.46 mm [95% CI -0.49, 1.41]; Heart Segmentation Dice: 0.95 [95% CI 0.950, 0.956]; Inner Chest Segmentation Dice: 0.98 [95% CI 0.982, 0.984]
